failure_modes.cause: TBAB crystallization or particulate fouling at valve seat during cooling
failure_modes.mitigation: Install heated BPR housing and upstream 0.5 μm filter

failure_modes.cause: TBAB/EG mixture chemical attack on elastomeric seals at 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Use FFKM seals rated for ionic liquids and verify compatibility

failure_modes.cause: Local hot spots from poor heat transfer in 1.6 mm tubing at low Re=133
failure_modes.mitigation: Install distributed temperature monitoring every 20 m of reactor length

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage causes immediate pressure buildup and system shutdown
validation_experiments: Run TBAB/EG blank at 120°C for 8 hours; monitor BPR pressure stability ±2%
Thermal cycling test: 25°C → 120°C → 25°C × 10 cycles; check for TBAB precipitation
Pump seal compatibility: circulate TBAB/EG at 120°C for 48 hours; inspect for swelling/degradation
